'''ngopachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbeddable|imbeddable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbeddable|imbeddable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngopachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngopachithi|ngopachithi]] || [[word:ngopachiji|ngopachiji]] || [[word:ngopachishi|ngopachishi]] || [[word:ngopachiki|ngopachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngopachuthuthu|ngopachuthuthu]] || [[word:ngopachujuju|ngopachujuju]] || [[word:ngopachushushu|ngopachushushu]] || [[word:ngopachukuku|ngopachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngopachuthu|ngopachuthu]] || [[word:ngopachuju|ngopachuju]] || [[word:ngopachushu|ngopachushu]] || [[word:ngopachuku|ngopachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngopachufthuf|ngopachufthuf]] || [[word:ngopachufjuf|ngopachufjuf]] || [[word:ngopachufshuf|ngopachufshuf]] || [[word:ngopachufkuf|ngopachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngopachethe|ngopachethe]] || [[word:ngopacheje|ngopacheje]] || [[word:ngopacheshe|ngopacheshe]] || [[word:ngopacheke|ngopacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngopachothotho|ngopachothotho]] || [[word:ngopachojojo|ngopachojojo]] || [[word:ngopachoshosho|ngopachoshosho]] || [[word:ngopachokoko|ngopachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngopachotho|ngopachotho]] || [[word:ngopachojo|ngopachojo]] || [[word:ngopachosho|ngopachosho]] || [[word:ngopachoko|ngopachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngopachofthof|ngopachofthof]] || [[word:ngopachofjof|ngopachofjof]] || [[word:ngopachofshof|ngopachofshof]] || [[word:ngopachofkof|ngopachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngopachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngopachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngopachĂŠthĂŠ|ngopachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngopachĂŠjĂŠ|ngopachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngopachĂŠshĂŠ|ngopachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngopachĂŠkĂŠ|ngopachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngopachathatha|ngopachathatha]] || [[word:ngopachajaja|ngopachajaja]] || [[word:ngopachashasha|ngopachashasha]] || [[word:ngopachakaka|ngopachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngopachatha|ngopachatha]] || [[word:ngopachaja|ngopachaja]] || [[word:ngopachasha|ngopachasha]] || [[word:ngopachaka|ngopachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngopachafthaf|ngopachafthaf]] || [[word:ngopachafjaf|ngopachafjaf]] || [[word:ngopachafshaf|ngopachafshaf]] || [[word:ngopachafkaf|ngopachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngopachasha|ngopachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngopachshĂ«sha|ngopachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngopachrosha|ngopachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngopachmusha|ngopachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngopachyasha|ngopachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongopachnkshĂ«sha|gongopachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongopachnkrosha|gongopachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongopachnkmusha|gongopachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongopachnkyasha|gongopachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngopapachasha|ngopapachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngopapachshĂ«sha|ngopapachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngopapachrosha|ngopapachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngopapachmusha|ngopapachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngopapachyasha|ngopapachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongopapachnkshĂ«sha|gongopapachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongopapachnkrosha|gongopapachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongopapachnkmusha|gongopapachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongopapachnkyasha|gongopapachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngepĂŠchasha|ngepĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngepĂŠchshĂ«sha|ngepĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngepĂŠchrosha|ngepĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngepĂŠchmusha|ngepĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngepĂŠchyasha|ngepĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongepĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gongepĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongepĂŠchnkrosha|gongepĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongepĂŠchnkmusha|gongepĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongepĂŠchnkyasha|gongepĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngopfachasha|ngopfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngopfachshĂ«sha|ngopfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngopfachrosha|ngopfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngopfachmusha|ngopfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngopfachyasha|ngopfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongopfachnkshĂ«sha|gongopfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongopfachnkrosha|gongopfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongopfachnkmusha|gongopfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongopfachnkyasha|gongopfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
